notes: Core game loop works well with nice visuals, but keyboard controls are overridden by mouse tracking (paddle always follows mouse, making arrow keys non-functional), and the auto-launch after 2.4 seconds removes player agency; ball also launches without proper angle variety.
Visuals are nice, but keyboard movement is completely overridden by mouse position, indestructible bricks lack collision, and waiting 2.4 seconds during serve softlocks the game.

Looks recognizably like Breakout, but paddle movement is effectively overridden by forced mouse tracking, serve can auto-start without launching the ball, particle color rendering is broken, and the title screen never initializes demo bricks so it feels incomplete and buggy.
